issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill is limited to Node.js/Python, not fully cross-platform for all AI agents.

scenarios.name: Embedded vector DB with automatic embeddings for a Node CLI
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a generic external vector store with manual OpenAI embedding calls; treatment used lancedb.connect() with the embedding registry's sourceField()/vectorField() so .search(text) auto-embeds.

scenarios.name: Hybrid keyword + vector search with metadata filter
scenarios.rationale: Baseline merged separate keyword and vector queries manually; treatment used table.createIndex("text", { config: lancedb.Index.fts() }) and .search(query, { queryType: "hybrid" }).where(...) per the SKILL.md.
